rationale: Vision adds Productivity Shift paragraph and 6 named, DDx-mapped pain points immediately before the Physics section; PRD links to them and frames its existing clusters as the named problem clusters. All AC items satisfied.

findings.summary: Each of the 6 pain points includes an explicit DDx capability mapping in italics, satisfying the 'no pain points that don't map to DDx capabilities' constraint.
PRD update is a link/framing change rather than a duplicated list, which keeps vision as the single source of truth for the 6 pain points.
